message:
style: rustfmt line wrapping across models and providers

Apply rustfmt formatting to long lines in models.rs,
provider_metadata.rs, and all five provider implementations
(anthropic, azure, cohere, openai, openai_responses). These are
purely whitespace/line-break changes with no logic modifications.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
